content.en:
Lord of the Dragonlizard.

Lord of the Golden Moon!

Lord of the Sea Vortex!

The strength of these three other shore-level geniuses is no less than that of Ye Tian before, and they are also the three other shore-level geniuses invited by the Xiao family.

They all stood in front and began to explore the mountain range.

Soon.

They walked into a passageway, followed by the other Shore-level geniuses and the Master of Mystery.

After a while, they found a ruin stone.

After some excavation, sixty-six ruin stones were found.

"It was so easy to get so many !!! of the Sunrise Stone"

All the other side level geniuses were shocked.

After all, they were not the previous batch of other shore-level geniuses, but they had just come in and didn't know much about this place, so they didn't know how rich and precious the resources in this treasure land were.

They only know that in the outside world, a piece of ruin sun stone is worth a lot of money, and they have to fight for it when they encounter it.

As a result, here, I found so many at random, and it didn't seem to be difficult at all.

Soon after, they found a second place.

This time it was a little less, but there were also fifty-seven ruin stones.

Time passes.

Soon.

They saw a cave that emitted a rich glow of the sun.

It's all too similar to the last time.

Suddenly, the Lord of Mystery became solemn.

"Everyone, there is a high probability that there is a powerful python in this cave, so be careful. The Lord of Mystery reminded.

The Lord of the Dragon Lizard was very confident in his own strength, so he said: "Lord of Mystery, if there is really a giant python, then leave it to me!"

As he spoke, he went in.

The next second.

The Lord of the Dragon Lizard came out, and with him came a ruined stone python.

In the face of the Stone Python, the Lord of the Mysteries naturally had already made arrangements.

"Array!"

The Lord of Mystery shouted.

The next moment.

One by one, a genius at the other side level took out a stone mirror and began to set up the formation through the stone mirror.

Of course.

Ye Tian didn't need to set up a formation, because he was strong and not afraid of petrification, but those top geniuses at the other side level couldn't compete with the ability to petrify, so he had to set up a formation to save his life.

Airplanes!

A special formation is arranged, if the gray-white light of the Xuyang Giant Python comes out, it will also be canceled out by the formation, and it will not petrify all the geniuses of the other side.

Thundered!

The Lord of the Dragon Lizard fought with this ruin stone python, and for a moment he fell into disadvantage.

"Lord of the Golden Moon, Lord of the Sea Vortex, Lord of the Endless, the three of you come together to help me kill this giant python!"

The Lord of the Dragon Lizard hurriedly said.

At first, he still underestimated the Stone Python, but now it seems that the Stone Python is indeed too fierce, and it is impossible for him to kill the Stone Python by himself.

If it takes a long time, there are more petrified parts of his body, and it will be a little dangerous!

Ye Tian, the Lord of the Golden Moon, and the Lord of the Sea Vortex naturally did not sit idly by, and immediately took action.

Of course.

Four to one, Ye Tian didn't need to use the supreme technique of the other side, otherwise there would be no need for these three other shore-level geniuses to make a move.

He only exerts his previous level of help.

Thundered!!!!

The four other shore-level geniuses besieged this ruined stone python and completely gained the upper hand.

Gradually, the stone python was injured.

The other other Shore-level geniuses did not participate, and their main task was to set up a formation to protect the Lord of Mystery.

Time passes.

The injuries of the Stone Python became more and more serious, and its breath gradually weakened.

Seeing this, the Lord of the Dragon Lizard was very excited.

The Lord of Mystery was also relieved.

"Inviting the Lord of the Dragon Lizard, they are indeed a wise move, although they have paid a lot of price, but at least they can kill this giant python!" said the Lord of Mystery secretly.

After another period of time, the Stone Python was on the verge of death.

Just as the Lord of the Dragon Lizard and the others were relaxing, the body of the Stone Python suddenly exploded, and a terrifying gray light swept through the surrounding void.

"Retreat!"

Ye Tian shouted.

Whew!!

The four of them retreated as soon as possible, but the speed of the Lord of the Golden Moon was a little slower.

Suddenly.

Part of his body was covered in gray light.

When they pushed out of the gray and white light area, they found that half of the Golden Moon Lord's body had been petrified.

Click!

This half of the body was directly shattered, but the Lord of the Golden Moon quickly recovered the other side of the body, but the injury was not fully recovered, and the body was only repaired completely.

"What a terrifying petrification ability!"

The Lord of the Golden Moon's face changed.

Just now, if he had been a little slower, his entire body would have been petrified, and he might have died with this stone python.

The Lord of the Dragon Lizard was also frightened, he also thought that the Stone Python was dead, and there was no way to do it, but the other party also self-exploded and released an even more terrifying gray and white light, which could instantly petrify the Lord of the Golden Moon of the same level.

Ye Tian didn't panic, nor was he afraid, but he was a little surprised.

He also didn't expect the Stone Python to have such a method.

But now that I know, I'll pay attention next time.

When the time comes, if the Stone Python wants to explode itself and die with them, it will not be able to do it at all.

"Next time, be careful!" said the Lord of the Golden Moon.

Then.

The Lord of the Mysteries, they come.

"Lord of the Golden Moon, are you alright?" asked the Lord of Mysticism.

"It's okay!"

The Lord of the Golden Moon shook his head, "However, I need to rest for a while to regain my strength. "

"Here's for you!"

The Lord of Mystery took out some of the Origin Bamboo Marrow of the Other Side and healed the Lord of the Golden Moon, so that he could recover his strength faster.

Seeing these Origin Bamboo Pulp on the other side, the Lord of the Golden Moon was overjoyed.

This is a good thing to heal, with these Origin Bamboo Marrow on the other side, he can recover his strength faster.

So, he took over these other side of the origin bamboo marrow.

After some time, the Lord of the Golden Moon finished healing.

They set off again.

Next, they found the ruin stones one after another, and they harvested more and more, and they were lucky enough not to encounter the ruin stone python again.

this day.

Just when they found a ruin stone again, they chiseled the stone wall and found that there were a lot of ruin yang stones, so they shot again and again, broke through the stone wall, and excavated more ruin yang stones.

Abrupt.

Click!

The stone wall was pierced, and a cave was connected.

Then.

A pair of huge pupils looked over.

Airplanes!

A gray light shot out, petrifying most of the body of one of the other shore-level geniuses.

They had encountered the Stone Python again.

Then.

Ye Tian reacted quickly, directly blocked the attack of the Stone Giant Python, and waved his hand to remove this petrified other shore-level genius with most of his body, saving his life.
